name: swim-send-off
description: Swim set on a send-off clock: 10×100 m freestyle 'on 1:30' at Critical Swim Speed. The send-off (not the rest) is fixed, carried as Block.scoring.scheme 'send_off' with intervalSec 90; pace target via relativeToThreshold of CSS (METHODOLOGY-VALIDATION G3 — send-off intervals).
